data.title: Norwegian Group orders 30 Boeing 737-8 planes for European expansion. First direct Boeing order for the group.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on September 26, 2025, Boeing and Norwegian Group revealed a significant deal where the airline group has initiated an order for 30 737-8 aircraft. This move is part of Norwegian Group's strategy to enhance its operations throughout Europe. This partnership marks the group's initial direct purchase from Boeing, highlighting the growing collaboration between the two entities.

data.title: ChainUp hosts event with 400 executives discussing digital assets regulation before TOKEN2049 Singapore.
data.description: Singapore, on September 26, 2025 - ChainUp, a renowned company in digital asset technology solutions, is organizing an important event titled "The All Time High (ATH) Night: Unlocking Infinite B2B Digital Assets Growth" on Tuesday, September 30, 2025, at Lantern Singapore. This event aims to bring together key industry players and stakeholders to discuss strategies for maximizing business growth in the digital asset sector.

data.title: AiMOGA's robot "Mornine" is the first to achieve full CE certification in hardware and software in 2025 in China.
data.description: In September 2025, in Wuhu, China, AiMOGA Robotics celebrated a major achievement with their humanoid robot "Mornine" obtaining three essential EU certifications. These certifications include CE-MD for Machinery Safety, CE-RED for Radio Equipment, and EN 18031 for Cybersecurity and Data Protection. This marks a significant step for AiMOGA Robotics in advancing their technology, making Mornine one of the first robots to have met these rigorous standards.
Spain's Economy Grew 0.8% in Second Quarter, Slightly Better Than Expected 0.7%
SPAIN (Q2) GDP YOY ACTUAL: 3.1% VS 2.8% PREVIOUS;EST 2.8%

data.title: McLaren Racing partners with Groq in a deal on Sept 26, 2025, for the McLaren Formula 1 Team.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between McLaren Racing and inference provider Groq, announced in Mountain View, Calif., and Woking, United Kingdom on Sept. 26, 2025. Groq has been named an Official Partner of the McLaren Formula 1 Team. This collaboration will see Groq supporting the McLaren F1 Team, renowned for its innovation in the field, as they push forward in their racing endeavors.
NOBA BANK SHARES OPEN AT SEK84.90 IN DEBUT; IPO PRICED AT SEK70

data.title: SES appoints Joseph Cohen from Trilantic Europe to its Board of Directors, focusing on diverse expertise for growth.
data.description: SES has appointed Mr. Joseph Cohen, Co-Founding Partner of Trilantic Europe, to its Board of Directors. The appointment is immediate and aligns with SES's strategy to enhance the Board's expertise and industry experience. Mr. Cohen brings valuable experience from his previous role and will contribute to the company's growth and value creation moving forward. SES continues its commitment to Board diversity and strength.
BOJ Rate Hike to 1.5% Expected Under Ueda, Former Board Member Predicts

data.title: Turkish Airlines orders up to 75 Boeing 787 Dreamliners, including 35 787-9 and 15 787-10 models with options for 25 more.
data.description: Boeing (NYSE: BA) and Turkish Airlines have recently disclosed a significant agreement, marking the flag carrier's most extensive Boeing widebody procurement to date. The deal involves the purchase of up to 75 787 Dreamliners, comprising 35 of the 787-9 model, 15 of the larger 787-10, with an additional 25 787s available as options. This collaboration is anticipated to have a substantial impact on both companies' operations, signaling growth and expansion within the aviation industry.
JPX CEO Says Selling ETFs by BOJ Might Not Significantly Affect the Market

data.title: Upcoming iQOO 15 to feature new Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chip, announced at Qualcomm Summit. #TechNews
data.description: In Dongguan, China on September 26, 2025, iQOO announced that the iQOO 15 will be one of the initial smartphones to feature the latest Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chip. At the 2025 Snapdragon Summit, Qualcomm introduced the cutting-edge flagship mobile technology on its first day.

data.title: SES to pay shareholders EUR 0.25/A-share (EUR 0.10/B-share) as interim dividend on Oct 16. Plans at least EUR 0.25/A-share (EUR 0.10/B-share) final dividend in Apr 2026.
data.description: SES's Board of Directors in Luxembourg has greenlit an interim dividend payment of EUR 0.25 per A-share (EUR 0.10 per B-share) scheduled for shareholders on October 16, 2025. This move aligns with SES's focus on delivering returns to its shareholders. Following this, contingent on financial performance and shareholder consent, a final dividend of at least EUR 0.25 per A-share (EUR 0.10 per B-share) is anticipated to be paid in April 2026. Stay updated by following SES on Twitter.

data.title: 5th WCBR in Hangzhou welcomed participants from 100+ countries, marking first event in China. #BOE #UNESCO #ScienceDecade
data.description: Taking place in Hangzhou, China on September 22, 2025, the 5th World Congress of Biosphere Reserves (WCBR) has attracted participation from more than 100 countries and territories. This is the first instance of the event being held in China and the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: GitHub Mobile improves Copilot by adding task management capabilities, enabling users to track coding tasks on the go.
data.description: GitHub Mobile has launched improved task management through Copilot, enabling users to initiate and monitor coding tasks while on the move. This feature provides seamless integration for developers, facilitating a more efficient workflow.
Iran: IAEA Agreement Valid Only If No Hostile Actions or UN Sanctions Are Reinstated

data.title: Regulators are scrutinizing stock surges prior to corporate crypto purchases. No official actions have been taken yet.
data.description: Regulatory bodies have contacted companies following atypical market fluctuations preceding treasury disclosures. Despite this, no official enforcement measures have been substantiated.
KOSPI INDEX CLOSED DOWN 2.45%, LARGEST SINGLE-DAY DROP SINCE AUGUST 1

data.title: Miss Universe partners with Zetrix for blockchain voting app, empowering millions with secure voting.
data.description: In a significant move, the Miss Universe Organization (MUO) has teamed up with Zetrix AI Berhad to leverage the advanced capabilities of Zetrix, a Layer-1 public blockchain. This collaboration, unveiled in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia on Sept. 25, 2025, aims to empower a vast global audience of millions of fans through secure voting mechanisms and immersive AI companions. The partnership is set to revolutionize the beauty pageant industry by incorporating cutting-edge technology to enhance user engagement.

data.title: CSL Vifor and Travere Therapeutics endorse new guidelines for IgA Nephropathy treatment. Sparsentan suggested for patients at risk.
data.description: In a recent announcement made in St. Gallen, Switzerland, and San Diego, it was mentioned that FILSPARI® (sparsentan) could be a feasible option for individuals suffering from IgA Nephropathy and facing the threat of declining kidney function. The collaboration between CSL Vifor and Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TVTX) underlines their endorsement of the latest findings regarding this potential treatment. The disclosure was made on September 26, 2025, highlighting the joint efforts to address the needs of patients dealing with IgA Nephropathy, a condition that affects a significant number of individuals globally.
